properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: So rich and so deep Unsearchable, It's the Love divine Redeeming Love.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: For Me For You, Unworthy but saved by Grace, For Me For You, Redeeming Love.

verse.name: v3
v4
verse.lines: How beautiful it is, How sweet it is, To hum of the Lamb divine, Redeeming Love.
